overview: Dire Wolf is a Normal-class Beast/None monster found in Ruins. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 30 HP, 19 physical damage, 100 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 3. 5 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Common Wolf Attack Jump Run at 150% ratio (285 base damage). Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilityy: Common Wolf Attack Jump Run.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 5 melee attacks. Common Wolf Attack Forward (120%), Common Wolf Attack Left (120%), Common Wolf Attack Right (120%), and more.

phases.name: Rush / Charge
phases.description: 2 rush/charge attacks for gap-closing. Common Wolf Attack Jump (120%), Common Wolf Attack Jump Run (150%).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Common Wolf Attack Jump Run
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 1 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Common Wolf Attack Jump Run. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 200 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster
Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilities: Common Wolf Attack Jump Run

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
